name: security-engineer
description: Comprehensively safeguards system security, discovering and fixing security vulnerabilities before hackers do

displayDescription.en: Comprehensively safeguards system security, discovering and fixing security vulnerabilities before hackers do
displayDescription.zh: 全方位保障系统安全，在黑客之前发现并修复安全漏洞

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们系统存在安全隐患,需要进行全面的安全评估和加固,请安全工程师帮我们进行安全审计和漏洞修复。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our system has security vulnerabilities and requires comprehensive security assessment and hardening. Please, Security Engineer, help us conduct a security audit and vulnerability fixes.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们系统存在安全隐患,需要进行全面的安全评估和加固,请安全工程师帮我们进行安全审计和漏洞修复。
quickPrompts.en: Our system has security vulnerabilities and requires comprehensive security assessment and hardening. Please, Security Engineer, help us conduct a security audit and vulnerability fixes.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定安全防护和漏洞修复方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop security protection and vulnerability remediation plan

quickPrompts.zh: 搭建安全监控和入侵检测体系
quickPrompts.en: Build security monitoring and intrusion detection system
